creator: larshenrikoern@outlook.dk
text:
Hi Yuri

No I have not tried graphis/art. I will do that. Rawtherapee in a more friendly version might be nice. I like Lightzone, because it is giving very unique results because of the way it calculates the exposure. And 15 years ago it nearest competitor was rawtherapee.  For a lot years I was very active in its old community. But it is now gone. And development has for many years been on and of. It has only active developer. 

Thank you for your time. If the new version of Lightzone does not work better, I might suggest to remove it form the ports tree.

Thank you and have a nice day
Lars H
